stepsSummary: Install FitOne as a PWA on Android, run onboarding in Beginner mode, set basic goals.
expectedSummary: PWA installs & launches standalone; onboarding uses simple language and leads clearly to today's log.
actualResult: Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
errorMessage:
Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
Call log:
  - navigating to "http://127.0.0.1:4173/", waiting until "load"
summary: BUG: UAT-001 Install & first-run (Beginner, Android PWA) - Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
reproSteps: Open app root and verify app shell is rendered.
Validate manifest link and service-worker capability in browser context.
Navigate to Settings and enforce Beginner mode onboarding state.
Persist onboarding mode and reload app.
Return to Today tab and verify primary logging entry points are visible.
expected: PWA installs & launches standalone; onboarding uses simple language and leads clearly to today's log.
actual: Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
recommendation: Fix the failing Onboarding flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-001 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Manifest reference remains valid and discoverable.
Verify: Beginner mode state is persisted across reload.
Verify: Today tab remains usable after initial setup flow.
